3198220.name: Kato Pirato
3198220.description:
Join Pirate Cat in an endless runner adventure like no other!

~ Sail through the jungle in a makeshift box-boat, collecting coins and unlocking special bonuses.

~ Navigate through rune gates to gain unique powers and gather various collectibles along the way.

FEATURES:

• Exciting Jungle Setting: Explore vibrant jungle landscapes.

• Collect Coins: Gather coins to unlock special abilities and items.

• Rune Gates: Pass through rune gates to gain unique powers.

• Fun Collectibles: Discover and collect various items to enhance your adventure.

• Endless Fun: Keep running and exploring for as long as you can!

Join the adventure and see how far you can sail with Kato Pirato!
